description: Letter of appeal for charity, in a mixture of Arabic script, Judaeo-Arabic, and Hebrew. The addressee may be asked to write to 'al-ḥaḍra al-nafīsa' on behalf of the petitioner. Interestingly, the term "sultān" is used in reference to the addressee, evidently a high government dignitary. Dating: likely Ayyubid era. ASE
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
